title: Forest Focus
description: Immerse yourself in the gentle rustle of leaves and distant bird calls. Perfect for deep concentration.

title: Ocean Calm
description: Slow, rhythmic waves washing over the shore. A soothing experience to quiet the mind.

title: Midnight Sleep
description: A dark, velvet night with the softest hum of a distant storm. Designed for deep rest.

title: Morning Reset
description: Crisp morning air and the first light of dawn. Re-energize your system.

title: Zen Garden
description: The sound of sand being raked and water trickling. A minimalist approach to peace.

title: Cosmic Drift
description: Ethereal synth pads and low-frequency oscillations. Explore the depths of your thoughts.
